SEARCH
Package net.sourceforge.plantuml.packetdiag

Class PacketIndicator

java.lang.Object
net.sourceforge.plantuml.klimt.shape.TextBlockMemoized
net.sourceforge.plantuml.packetdiag.PacketIndicator
All Implemented Interfaces:
TextBlock, UDrawable, UShape
public class PacketIndicator extends TextBlockMemoized
Renders the bit-position scale for packetdiag diagrams.

A PacketIndicator represents a single tick on the scale (one bit position). Depending on its configuration it can draw:

  • a full-height or half-height vertical tick line,
  • an optional numeric label centered above the tick.

Instances are typically created by PacketDiagram when building the scale for a given colWidth and scaleInterval.

    Modifier and Type

    static final double
    V_LINE_FULL
    Height (in pixels) of a full tick mark.
    static final double
    V_LINE_SHORT
    Height (in pixels) of a short tick mark (half of V_LINE_FULL).

  • Constructor Details

    • PacketIndicator

      public PacketIndicator(boolean full, boolean numbered, int bitNumber, Style style, ISkinParam skinParam)
      Creates a scale indicator for a given bit position.
      Parameters:
      full - true to draw a full-height tick mark, false to draw a short tick mark
      numbered - true to render the bit index label, false to draw only the tick
      bitNumber - the bit index to display when numbered is enabled
      style - the style used for font/stroke/color resolution
      skinParam - the skin parameters used for rendering (colors, fonts, etc.)

  • Method Details

    • drawU

      public void drawU(UGraphic ug)
      Draws this indicator (optional centered number + vertical tick) onto the provided graphics context.

      The number text block is always measured to keep consistent padding/alignment between numbered and non-numbered indicators.

      Parameters:
      ug - the target graphics context

    • calculateDimensionSlow

      public XDimension2D calculateDimensionSlow(StringBounder stringBounder)
      Computes the indicator dimensions (label + tick).

      Height is the label height plus the tick mark height. Width is derived from the label (when present) and the stroke thickness used to draw the tick.

      Specified by:
      calculateDimensionSlow in class TextBlockMemoized
      Parameters:
      stringBounder - font metrics provider
      Returns:
      the bounding box of this indicator

    • createNumberTextBlock

      public static TextBlock createNumberTextBlock(FontConfiguration fg, ISkinParam skinParam, CharSequence... s)
      Creates a TextBlock that draws the numeric label for a given indicator.
      Parameters:
      fg - font configuration used to render the label
      skinParam - the skin parameters used for rendering
      s - the label content (typically the bit index)
      Returns:
      a text block that renders the label

    • createVLineTextBlock

      public static TextBlock createVLineTextBlock(Style style, ISkinParam skinParam, double y, double height)
      Creates a TextBlock that draws the vertical tick line of an indicator.
      Parameters:
      style - the style used to resolve stroke and color
      skinParam - the skin parameters used for rendering
      y - vertical start offset (in pixels) for the tick line
      height - tick line height (in pixels)
      Returns:
      a text block that renders the vertical tick line
